headline: Is ExxonMobil Positioned to Capitalize on Rising LNG & Power Demand?
summary: XOM expands its LNG footprint as rising data center demand and additional export capacity strengthen its long-term growth strategy.

headline: Sound Shore Fund Continues to Maintain Confidence in EQT (EQT)
summary: Sound Shore Management, an investment management firm, has released its investor letter for the first quarter of 2026. A copy of the letter is available to download here. In Q1 2026, the Sound Shore Fund Investor Class (SSHFX) and Institutional Class (SSHVX) declined 3.45% and 3.43%, respectively, compared to the S&P 500’s -4.33% return and […]

headline: EQT (EQT) Is Up 7.2% After Winning €5B EU Tech Scaleup Mandate Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: EQT was recently selected by the European Commission and founding investors as preferred investment adviser and fund manager for the €5.00 billion Scaleup Europe Fund, backing AI, quantum computing, clean energy, biotech and medical innovation from Series B onwards. This appointment, won through a competitive process against established European venture firms, underlines EQT’s growing role as a key allocator of capital to high-impact European technology scaleups. Next, we’ll examine how...
